translation: )(；（突然大量地）流出；泻出；涌出；涌出的水
analysis:
v  1 [I, Ipr, Ip] ~ (out) (from sth) flow or pour out suddenly in great quantities （突然大量地）流出, 泻出, 涌出: gushing water 涌出的水 * oil gushing out (from a well) （从井中）涌出的石油 * blood gushing from a wound 自伤口涌出的血.  2 [I, Ipr] ~ over sb/sth (fig derog 比喻, 贬) talk with excessive enthusiasm 滔滔不绝地说; 过分热心地说: Don't gush! 别唠唠叨叨说个没完! * a young mother gushing over a baby 喋喋不休地谈著婴儿的年轻母亲.
gush 
n (esp sing 尤作单数) sudden outflow or outburst 涌出; 迸发: a gush of oil, anger, enthusiasm 石油的涌出、 怒火的迸发、 热情的奔放.
gusher 
n oil-well with a strong natural flow (so that pumping is not needed) 喷油井（自动流出的油井）.
gushing 
adj: gushing compliments 滔滔不绝的赞扬话. 
gushingly 
adv.
expansions: gushing water 涌出的水
oil gushing out (from a well) （从井中）涌出的石油
blood gushing from a wound 自伤口涌出的血. 2 [I, Ipr] ~ over sb/sth (fig derog 比喻, 贬) talk with excessive enthusiasm 滔滔不绝地说; 过分热心地说: Don't gush! 别唠唠叨叨说个没完!
a young mother gushing over a baby 喋喋不休地谈著婴儿的年轻母亲.

translation: （突然的）一阵狂风；刮起阵阵的狂风；阵阵的狂风
analysis:
n (a) sudden violent rush of wind （突然的）一阵狂风: the wind blowing in gusts 刮起阵阵的狂风 * fitful gusts of wind 阵阵的狂风. (b) (fig 比喻) outburst of feeling 感情的迸发: a gust of temper 大发脾气.
gust 
v [I] (of the wind) blow in gusts （指风）劲吹, 猛刮: winds gusting up to 60 mph 风速达每小时60英里的狂风.
gusty 
adj (-ier, -iest) with wind blowing in gusts 有阵阵狂风的: a gusty day, wind 刮阵阵狂风的一天、 阵阵强劲的风.
expansions: the wind blowing in gusts 刮起阵阵的狂风
fitful gusts of wind 阵阵的狂风. (b) (fig 比喻) outburst of feeling 感情的迸发: a gust of temper 大发脾气.
winds gusting up to 60 mph 风速达每小时60英里的狂风.
a gusty day, wind 刮阵阵狂风的一天、 阵阵强劲的风.

translation: 口)；做某事的兴致；热忱
analysis: n [U] (infml 口) enthusiastic vigour in doing sth 做某事的兴致; 热忱: singing the choruses with great gusto 兴致勃勃地合唱.
expansions: singing the choruses with great gusto 兴致勃勃地合唱.

translation: 口)(；（腹腔的）内脏；肚子疼
analysis:
n  1 guts [pl] (infml 口) (a) internal organs of the abdomen （腹腔的）内脏: a pain in the guts 肚子疼. (b) (fig 比喻) essential (mechanical) parts of sth 某物的重要（机械）部分: remove the guts of a clock 除去钟的机芯.  2 guts [pl] (fig infml 比喻, 口) courage and determination 勇气与决心; 胆量; 魄力: a man with plenty of guts 很有魄力的人 * have the guts to do sth 有胆量做某事.  3 [C] (a) (anatomy 解) lower part of the alimentary canal; intestine 消化道的下段; 肠: dissecting a frog's gut 解剖蛙的肠. (b) (infml 口) abdomen; stomach 肚子; 胃: his huge beer gut, ie made fat by drinking beer 他的大啤酒肚.  4 guts [sing or pl v] (infml 口) person who eats a lot 饭量大的人: He's a real greedy guts. 他真是贪吃的大肚汉.  5 [U] thread made from the intestines of animals, used surgically for sewing wounds, and for violin and tennis-racket strings; catgut 肠线（用作外科的缝合线及小提琴和网球拍的弦）.  6 (idm 习语) hate sb's guts => hate. slog/sweat one's `guts out (infml 口) work very hard, to the point of exhaustion 拚命干.
gut 
v (-tt-) [Tn]  1 take the guts out of (a fish, etc) 取出（鱼等）的内脏.  2 destroy the inside or contents of (a building, room, etc) 毁坏（建筑物、 房间等）的内部或内部的东西: a warehouse gutted by fire 内部为火焚毁的仓库.
gut 
adj [attrib 作定语] instinctive rather than based on thought 本能的、 非理性的: a gut feeling/reaction 本能的感觉[反应].
gutless 
adj cowardly 怯懦的; 胆小的.
expansions: a pain in the guts 肚子疼. (b) (fig 比喻) essential (mechanical) parts of sth 某物的重要（机械）部分: remove the guts of a clock 除去钟的机芯. 2 guts [pl] (fig infml 比喻, 口) courage and determination 勇气与决心; 胆量; 魄力: a man with plenty of guts 很有魄力的人

have the guts to do sth 有胆量做某事. 3 [C] (a) (anatomy 解) lower part of the alimentary canal; intestine 消化道的下段; 肠: dissecting a frog's gut 解剖蛙的肠. (b) (infml 口) abdomen; stomach 肚子; 胃: his huge beer gut, ie made fat by drinking beer 他的大啤酒肚. 4 guts [sing or pl v] (infml 口) person who eats a lot 饭量大的人: He's a real greedy guts. 他真是贪吃的大肚汉. 5 [U] thread made from the intestines of animals, used surgically for sewing wounds, and for violin and tennis-racket strings; catgut 肠线（用作外科的缝合线及小提琴和网球拍的弦）. 6 (idm 习语) hate sb's guts => hate. slog/sweat one's `guts out (infml 口) work very hard, to the point of exhaustion 拚命干.
a warehouse gutted by fire 内部为火焚毁的仓库.
a gut feeling/reaction 本能的感觉[反应].

translation: )(；口)；充满勇气和决心的
analysis: adj (-ier, -iest) (infml 口) full of courage and determination 充满勇气和决心的: a gutsy fighter 坚定无畏的战士.
expansions: a gutsy fighter 坚定无畏的战士.

translation: 排水檐沟；天沟；见附录
analysis: n  1 long (usu semicircular) metal or plastic channel fixed under the edge of a roof to carry away rain-water 排水檐沟; 天沟. =>illus at App 1 见附录1插图, page vii.  2 (a) (channel at the) side of a road, next to the kerb 路边沟; 排水沟; 阴沟: cigarette packets thrown into the gutter 扔在阴沟里的香烟盒. (b) the gutter [sing] (fig 比喻) poor or debased state of life 贫苦低级的生活: the language of the gutter, ie vulgar language 粗鄙的语言 * He picked her out of the gutter and made her a great lady. 他使她脱离贫苦生活, 并成为贵妇.
expansions: cigarette packets thrown into the gutter 扔在阴沟里的香烟盒. (b) the gutter [sing] (fig 比喻) poor or debased state of life 贫苦低级的生活: the language of the gutter, ie vulgar language 粗鄙的语言
He picked her out of the gutter and made her a great lady. 他使她脱离贫苦生活, 并成为贵妇.

translation: )(；（指声音）（似）喉间发出的；用喉音低声嘟囔
analysis:
adj (of a sound) (seeming to be) produced in the throat （指声音）（似）喉间发出的: a low guttural growl 用喉音低声嘟囔 * guttural consonants 软颚辅音.
guv
=> governor3.
guvnor
=> governor3.
expansions: a low guttural growl 用喉音低声嘟囔
guttural consonants 软颚辅音.

translation: )(；口)；无节制地吃或喝某物
analysis: v [I, Ip, Tn, Tn.p] ~ (away); ~ sth (down/up) (infml 口) eat or drink sth greedily 无节制地吃或喝某物; 滥吃; 狂饮: He's always guzzling. 他总是大吃大喝的. * guzzle beer 狂饮啤酒 * The children guzzled down all the cakes. 孩子们大吃一通, 把蛋糕都吃光了.
expansions: He's always guzzling. 他总是大吃大喝的.
guzzle beer 狂饮啤酒
The children guzzled down all the cakes. 孩子们大吃一通, 把蛋糕都吃光了.

translation: 口)；体育馆；健身房
analysis:
n (infml 口)  1 [C] gymnasium 体育馆; 健身房: exercises in the gym 在健身房的锻炼.  2 [U] gymnastics, esp at school 体操（尤指学校中的）: I don't like gym. 我不喜欢体操. * [attrib 作定语] gym-shoes, ie esp plimsolls 运动鞋（尤指橡胶底帆布面的） * a gym mistress 体育课女教师.
gym-slip (also slip) 
n sleeveless tunic worn in Britain by some girls as part of school uniform （英国女生的）无袖制服.
expansions: exercises in the gym 在健身房的锻炼. 2 [U] gymnastics, esp at school 体操（尤指学校中的）: I don't like gym. 我不喜欢体操.
[attrib 作定语] gym-shoes, ie esp plimsolls 运动鞋（尤指橡胶底帆布面的）
a gym mistress 体育课女教师.

translation: 体育的；体操的；体操
analysis:
adj of physical exercises and training 体育的; 体操的.
gymnastics 
n [pl] (forms of) exercises performed to develop the muscles or fitness or to demonstrate agility 体操; 体能训练: (fig 比喻) mental gymnastics, ie mental agility, elaborate reasoning 智力训练.
expansions: (fig 比喻) mental gymnastics, ie mental agility, elaborate reasoning 智力训练.

translation: 习语)；口)(；痛骂或严惩某人
analysis: n (idm 习语) give sb `gyp (Brit infml 口) (a) scold or punish sb very severely 痛骂或严惩某人. (b) cause sb much pain 使某人很痛苦: My rheumatism's been giving me gyp. 我的风湿病使我一直很痛苦.
expansions: My rheumatism's been giving me gyp. 我的风湿病使我一直很痛苦.

translation: 吉卜赛人；比喻)；我从未在任何一个地方长住过；一定是我合该周游世界
analysis: n member of a wandering, originally Asiatic, people who live in caravans 吉卜赛人: (fig 比喻) I've never lived in one place for long; it must be the Gypsy in me, ie my desire to wander round the world. 我从未在任何一个地方长住过, 一定是我合该周游世界. * [attrib 作定语] a gypsy camp 吉卜赛营地 * the gypsy life, ie wandering from place to place 吉卜赛式的生活（到处流浪）.
accepted_answers: 我从未在任何一个地方长住过
一定是我合该周游世界
expansions: (fig 比喻) I've never lived in one place for long; it must be the Gypsy in me, ie my desire to wander round the world. 我从未在任何一个地方长住过, 一定是我合该周游世界.
[attrib 作定语] a gypsy camp 吉卜赛营地
the gypsy life, ie wandering from place to place 吉卜赛式的生活（到处流浪）.

translation: 陀螺罗盘
analysis: adj: a gyroscopic compass 陀螺罗盘.
expansions: a gyroscopic compass 陀螺罗盘.
